name: Sauerbraten Mit Ingwer Kuchen Sosse (Saurebrat
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beef roast in a deep ceramic or glass bowl. Add onions, peppercorns, cloves, and bay leaf.
2. Pour white vinegar and cider vinegar over the meat; chill, covered, for 4 days. Turn meat twice each day.
3. Remove the meat from the marinade, dry it well with paper towels, and strain the marinade into a bowl. Reserve onions and 1 cup marinade.
4. In a Dutch oven, brown the meat on all sides in hot vegetable oil. Sprinkle meat with salt.
5. Pour boiling water around the meat. Sprinkle crushed gingersnaps over the meat and simmer covered for 1.5 hours, turning often.
6. Add 1 cup of reserved marinade and cook the meat an additional 2 hours or more until tender. Remove the meat and keep it warm.
7. Strain the cooking juices into a large saucepan.
8. In a small bowl mix sour cream with flour. Stir this mixture into the cooking juices and cook, stirring, until the sauce is thickened and smooth.
9. Slice the meat into 1/4 inch slices; add to the hot gravy. Arrange the meat on a heated platter and pour extra sauce over it.
